$comment: Placeholder fixture for Phase 1.6 exemplar UC; replace with production-grade sample-data as part of Phase 4.5 sandbox validation.
description: Fixture exercising positive scenario for 22.38.3: When a data object tagged regulated_scope=EU,CH,UK is observed in a cloud storage bucket whose region is outside the allowed_regions list for that scope, the UC fires naming the bucket, region, and classification.
